comments.author: unknown
comments.text:
Feature: Native fonts and overlays
  Scenario: TextOverlay accepts built-in font name
    Given a Pixoo at IP "192.168.0.37"
    And I connect
    When I send text overlay "hello" using built-in font "minin Then a Draw/SendHttpText command should be sentn And the font id should be 4nn Scenario: List fonts returns built-in registryn Given a Pixoo at IP "192.168.0.37"n And I connectn When I list built-in fontsn Then the font list should include "mini

  Scenario: Upload sequence with overlays sends overlays after upload
    Given a Pixoo at IP "192.168.0.37"
    And I connect
    And a native GIF sequence with 1 frames and speed 100ms
    When I upload the native sequence with 2 overlays
    Then the overlays should be sent after the upload

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Closing as obsolete per user request during board cleanup.
